## Summary

- motivation:
- implementation:
- validation:

## Scenario Review Checklist

- [ ] Escalation remains realistic from `L1` through `L5`
- [ ] Early levels avoid jailbreak-style phrasing
- [ ] New or changed scenarios include provenance and `releaseTier`
- [ ] Overlap with existing scenarios was checked with `pnpm check:scenarios`
- [ ] Any holdout or organization-local content is kept out of public publishing paths

## Compatibility Notes

- [ ] Contracts, schemas, or exports changed
- [ ] Docs under `docs/` were updated when behavior changed
- [ ] Bundle/versioning implications are described
